headline: Progressive (PGR) Registers a Bigger Fall Than the Market: Important Facts to Note
summary: The latest trading day saw Progressive (PGR) settling at $194.13, representing a -2.88% change from its previous close.

headline: Progressive Likely To Report Higher Q1 Earnings; These Most Accurate Analysts Revise Forecasts Ahead Of Earnings Call
summary: Progressive Corp. (PGR) will release Q1 earnings on April 15, with analysts expecting $4.85/share. Stock closed at $199.88 on Thursday. Benzinga's most-accurate analysts have varying ratings and price targets.
